goal_text: Task 10968: You are looking for a moderately priced restaurant and it should be in the south part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address, phone number, and postcode of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
